title: COURT INFORMATION FINDER - 211info
text: OREGON JUDICIAL BRANCH COURT INFORMATION FINDER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Maintains a website with information on Oregon's county circuit courts, tax court, and Court of Appeals. Does not maintain information on municipal, justice, federal, or tribal courts. Criminal records may be accessed through county circuit courts. 1163 State Street Salem, OR 973012563 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Email Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation available by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Courts Criminal History Records Other Services Offered At This Location: CONSUMER ASSISTANCE AND PROTECTION - CRIMINAL JUSTICE COMPLAINTS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENT EDUCATION CLASSES LEGAL SERVICES - CRIMINAL RECORD EXPUNGEMENT LEGAL SERVICES - FAMILY LAW PROGRAM LEGAL SERVICES - NAME CHANGE FORMS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON JUDICIAL BRANCH
